description: A square graphic on a cream background with a faint line-drawn eagle watermark. Centered dark blue capital text in two lines reads TEMPORARY PROTECTED STATUS IS MEANT TO BE TEMPORARY, with a short red underline beneath the last word. The Department of Homeland Security seal and U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark appear at the bottom.
notable_text: TEMPORARY PROTECTED STATUS IS MEANT TO BE TEMPORARY.; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
